CustomField.formula: OR ( IF(TEXT(Status_Strategic_Services__c) = 'Converted to Opportunity', True, False), IF(TEXT(Status_Disease_Research__c) = 'Converted to Opportunity', True, False), IF(TEXT(Status_Drug_Discovery__c) = 'Converted to Opportunity', True, False), IF(TEXT(Status_Pre_Clinical_Studies__c) = 'Converted to Opportunity', True, False), IF(TEXT(Status_Clinical_Studies__c) = 'Converted to Opportunity', True, False), IF(TEXT(Status_QA_QC_Drug_Manufacturing_Process__c) = 'Converted to Opportunity', True, False), IF(TEXT(Status_Digital_Lab__c) = 'Converted to Opportunity', True, False), IF(TEXT(Status_Food_Quality__c) = 'Converted to Opportunity', True, False), IF(TEXT(Status_Food_Safety__c) = 'Converted to Opportunity', True, False), IF(TEXT(Status_Material__c) = 'Converted to Opportunity', True, False), IF(TEXT(Status_Chemicals__c) = 'Converted to Opportunity', True, False), IF(TEXT(Status_Energy__c) = 'Converted to Opportunity', True, False), IF(TEXT(Status_Geochemistry_Mining_and_Metals__c) = 'Converted to Opportunity', True, False), IF(TEXT(Status_Forensics_and_Security__c) = 'Converted to Opportunity', True, False), IF(TEXT(Status_Water__c) = 'Converted to Opportunity', True, False), IF(TEXT(Status_Air__c) = 'Converted to Opportunity', True, False), IF(TEXT(Status_Soil_Solids__c) = 'Converted to Opportunity', True, False), IF(TEXT(Status_Maternal_Fetal_Health__c) = 'Converted to Opportunity', True, False), IF(TEXT(Status_Newborn_Screening__c) = 'Converted to Opportunity', True, False), IF(TEXT(Status_Applied_Genomics__c) = 'Converted to Opportunity', True, False) )
CustomField.label: Conversion SAI Current Status
